name: AS Pro Kapital Grupp
summary: AS Pro Kapital Grupp, a real estate development company, develops, manages, purchases, and sells large-scale commercial and residential real estate properties in Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania. The company develops and sells apartments in residential real estate properties; develops and leases retail and office premises, as well as develops shopping and entertainment centers in Tallinn; and provides maintenance and other services. It also operates a hotel in Germany. AS Pro Kapital Grupp was founded in 1994 and is based in Tallinn, Estonia.
